conversation.speaker: Seller
conversation.message: Hi, my name is Alex and I'm reaching out from DeepData AI. We're a data processing solution that helps companies like yours streamline their data workflows and gain valuable insights. I came across Zymr and was impressed with the work you're doing in product engineering and AI services. Can you tell me a bit about your current data processing challenges?

conversation.speaker: Buyer
conversation.message: Ah, yeah, we do have some pain points with our data processing. But to be honest, we're pretty set with our current tools and vendors. What makes DeepData AI so special that we should consider switching?

conversation.speaker: Seller
conversation.message: Well, our solution is designed to handle large volumes of data and provide real-time analytics, which can help you make more informed decisions. We've also had great success with similar companies in the industry, with one of our clients seeing a 30% reduction in data processing time. I'd love to schedule a demo to show you how it works.

conversation.speaker: Buyer
conversation.message: I'm not sure that's necessary. We've already invested a lot in our current infrastructure, and I'm not sure we have the budget to bring in a new tool. Plus, our team is already familiar with what we have, so I'm not sure it's worth the disruption. What kind of pricing are we talking about?

conversation.speaker: Seller
conversation.message: Our pricing is competitive, with plans starting at $5,000 per month. But I think the benefits and ROI would far outweigh the costs. We've also had great success with integration, with most of our clients seeing a seamless transition.

conversation.speaker: Buyer
conversation.message: That's still a pretty significant expense, and like I said, we don't have the budget for it. Plus, I'm not even sure I'm the right person to be talking to about this. I'm the CTO, but our procurement and budget decisions are made by our CFO. I'd need to get approval from them before even considering a new tool.

conversation.speaker: Seller
conversation.message: I understand, and I'd be happy to set up a call with your CFO to discuss further. Can I send over some more information and we can schedule a follow-up conversation?

conversation.speaker: Buyer
conversation.message: No, I don't think that's necessary. Like I said, we're not in a position to bring in new tools or vendors right now, and I don't have the authority to approve new expenses. I appreciate the pitch, but I'm going to have to decline.

analysis.raw:
Score: 2
Outcome: Failure
Key_Objection: Price
Feedback: The seller should have been more prepared to address the buyer's budget concerns and provide a more tailored value proposition to overcome the price objection. Sentiment: Negative
